section.heading: “Central American countries” defined

content.p: For the purposes of this part, the term “Central American countries” includes Belize, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, Panama, and regional programs which benefit such countries.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–195, pt. I, § 466, as added Pub. L. 99–83, title VII, § 701, Aug. 8, 1985, 99 Stat. 237.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Another section 466 of Pub. L. 87–195 is classified to section 2286 of this title.
